Patch Set 3:

Humm, doing some local testing of build with patch-set #3, running the reproducer the mDS crashed with "(ldlm_lock.c:851:ldlm_lock_decref_internal_nolock()) ASSERTION( lock->l_readers > 0 ) failed". After some crash-dump analysis, I think that by enabling the possibility to find the old/orig lock with my patch, it allows more situations/possibilities to trigger the bug described in LU-4403 and fixed by Change-Id #8642 in b2_4. So I will need to re-base this patch on top of #8642.

Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

(2 comments)

While looking at the code, i was surprised that non-O_CREAT open reply reconstruction goes through mdt_reint_open(). Here both the parent and child are looked up (by name for the child) again which seems really wrong to me in the case of reply reconstruction since both might have been unlinked between the first request processing and the resent. It is definitely not related to this patch, but i think we have a bug here which could cause mfd to be leaked and orphan files to stay around until next MDS reboot.

Patch Set 5:

(2 comments)
Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

Patch Set 6:

Johann, it is interesting that you mention leaked orphans.  We had a MDS reboot recently and the MDS once started took over 4 hours to start processing real filesystem traffic.  We noticed that startup was stuck in cleaning up orphan files.  Orphan cleanup was very slow and sequential, and my estimate is that we had at least 120,000 orphaned files to clean up.

I have no idea if this potential leak was involved or not.

Patch Set 5:

(1 comment)

Patch Set 6: Code-Review+1

This patch is almost the same as what's present in http://review.whamcloud.com/#/c/5978/3

It also has same drawbacks - ie it's not generic enough and would only fix the problems for MDS intent lock enqueues totally ignoring same issues in other intent locks classes (glimpses).


With this in mind, I am ok for this patch to be used at sites affected by this issue, but we really need to develop proper solution (for master first).

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1

Crashed our MDS during testing.

Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1

(8 comments)

Patch Set 6:

This patch should be abandon in favor of the LU-2827 patch.

parents.subject: LU-4222 mdt: extra checking for getattr RPC.

commit.subject: LU-4584 mdt: ensure orig lock is found in hash upon resend
commit.message:
LU-4584 mdt: ensure orig lock is found in hash upon resend

Look for 1st lock found in hash for remote_hdl but that's not
new_lock itself.
There should only be 2 upon resent, new_lock and the 1st/orig
one we want ...

Signed-off-by: Bruno Faccini <bruno.faccini@intel.com>
Signed-off-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
Change-Id: If2b9287ef2d919ac46d8bf3a237b7040947db96b
